data.title: Hungarian Prime Minister Orban Intensifies Anti-Ukraine Rhetoric in Re-election Campaign
data.description: Hungarian Prime Minister Viktor Orban is amplifying his anti-Ukraine rhetoric as a central theme in his re-election campaign. Bloomberg posted on X that Orban's campaign is increasingly focusing on criticizing Kyiv's wartime leadership. This strategy marks a significant aspect of his political messaging as he seeks to secure another term in office. The campaign's emphasis on Ukraine highlights Orban's stance on regional geopolitics, which has been a contentious issue in Hungary's political landscape. The Prime Minister's approach reflects his broader political strategy and aligns with his previous positions on international relations.

data.title: GEOPOLITICS | India's Opposition Urges Reevaluation of Trade Deal with U.S.
data.description: India's opposition parties have urged Prime Minister Narendra Modi's government to reconsider the nation's trade agreement with the United States. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the opposition's call for amendments to the deal, citing concerns over its impact on domestic industries and economic sovereignty. The opposition argues that the current terms may not be favorable for India and could undermine local businesses. They are advocating for a thorough review and renegotiation to ensure the agreement aligns with India's economic interests. The call for action comes amid ongoing discussions about international trade relations and their implications for national economies.

data.title: BNB Surpasses 630 USDT with a 2.79% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Feb 21, 2026, 09:32 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has crossed the 630 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 630.080017 USDT, with a narrowed 2.79% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: 10x Research: Circle receives multiple positive boosts; fundamental and institutional factors combined drive stock price higher.
data.description: 10x Research published an article on its X platform stating that Circle (CRCL) stock has bucked the market trend and risen over the past week, closing above its 7-day and 30-day moving averages. At the institutional level, Cathie Wood's ARK Invest increased its holdings of CRCL by 218,000 shares during the market correction, indicating improved institutional confidence. Furthermore, Circle has entered into a strategic partnership with Polymarket, which will use native USDC as its primary settlement asset, further expanding the use of USDC in prediction markets. Analysts believe that the GENIUS Act framework could drive digital dollar reserves to flow more directly into the US Treasury market, and Circle may be a major beneficiary of this trend.

data.title: Research Team Reveals Something Big Is Brewing for XRP
data.description:
Media personality Paul Barron has sparked fresh excitement within the XRP community after hinting that a major development involving Ripple, XRP, and RLUSD could soon come to light. In a recent post on X, Barron revealed that his research team uncovered “something big” brewing for XRP in connection with the Clarity Act. Visit Website
source: https://thecryptobasic.com/2026/02/21/research-team-reveals-something-big-is-brewing-for-xrp/

data.title: DFINITY Foundation: 20% of Cloud Engine revenue will be used to destroy ICPs.
data.description: The DFINITY Foundation, in a statement published on the X platform, stated that the economic model of Internet Computers (ICPs) is changing. Under the old model, node providers were only paid for running nodes; under the new model, 80% of the cloud engine's revenue will be allocated to the nodes that power it, and 20% will be used to burn ICPs. Currently, the Node Provider Association has begun marketing the cloud engine to businesses across Europe.

data.title: DFINITY Foundation Revises Internet Computer Economics to Boost European Enterprise Interest
data.description: The DFINITY Foundation has announced updates to the economic model of the Internet Computer. According to BWEnews, the revised model allocates 80% of cloud engine revenue to node providers, while the remaining 20% is used to burn ICP tokens. This strategic move aims to enhance interest among enterprises in Europe. The Internet Computer's market capitalization currently stands at $1,205 million.

data.title: VanEck On-Chain Report: Selling pressure from long-term holders has eased, and hashrate contraction may improve subsequent reward structure.
data.description: VanEck's mid-February 2026 Bitcoin On-Chain Report indicates that Bitcoin's price has fallen by approximately 29% over the past 30 days, with the NUPL indicator approaching the "anxiety zone" and briefly entering the "fear zone." Meanwhile, open interest has fallen back to levels not seen since September 2024, suggesting some release of leverage risk. The report shows that the current sell-off primarily comes from mid-term holders of 1 to 5 years, but the distribution rate among those holding more than one year has slowed significantly in the past month. Furthermore, miner profit margins are under pressure, with the network hashrate declining by approximately 14% over the past 90 days. VanEck points out that historically, hashrate contractions have often been accompanied by subsequent improvements in returns.

data.title: Bitdeer disclosed that its Bitcoin holdings remained at 943.1 coins, with no net increase this week.
data.description: Nasdaq-listed Bitcoin mining company Bitdeer released its latest Bitcoin holdings data on the X platform. This week, its Bitcoin mining output was 189.8 BTC, but it also sold 189.8 BTC during the same period, resulting in a net increase of 0 BTC in its Bitcoin holdings. As of February 20, its Bitcoin holdings remained at approximately 943.1 BTC.

data.title: Half a million euro evaded in Emilia-Romagna with crypto trading
data.description:
The Guardia di Finanza of Piacenza uncovers a EUR 500,000 tax evasion linked to Bitcoin and Ethereum mining and undeclared wallets.
source: https://en.spaziocrypto.com/mining/half-a-million-euro-evaded-in-emilia-romagna-with-crypto-trading/

data.title: Ripple prepares to dump 1 billion XRP in a week
data.description:
Ripple is preparing for its routine escrow unlock of 1 billion XRP, a monthly event that dates back to 2017.
source: https://finbold.com/ripple-prepares-to-dump-1-billion-xrp-in-a-week/

data.title: Ethereum Circulation Surges Post-Merge Upgrade
data.description: Ethereum's circulation has increased by over 950,000 units since the completion of its merge upgrade. According to Odaily, the total circulation of Ethereum is now approximately 121.5 million units, with an annual inflation rate of about 0.23%.

data.title: India Reaffirms Oil Purchase Strategy Focused on National Interests
data.description:
India's Ministry of External Affairs spokesperson, Jaiswal, reiterated the country's oil purchasing strategy, emphasizing that it is guided by national interests. According to RTHK, Jaiswal stated that India's Foreign Secretary, Harsh Vardhan Shringla, had previously clarified India's stance on oil procurement, which remains unchanged. India will explore purchasing oil from Venezuela if commercial conditions permit.

Citing earlier reports from Indian media, Xinhua News Agency noted that on the 9th of this month, Shringla responded to related inquiries by affirming that India's energy policy consistently adheres to principles of adequate supply, reasonable pricing, and stable sources. India is committed to diversifying its energy supply in alignment with national interests.

data.title: GEOPOLITICS | European Nations Launch Cost-Effective Air Defense Initiative
data.description: In response to the significant role drones have played in the Russia-Ukraine conflict, several European countries are reevaluating their air defense strategies. According to Ming Pao, the United Kingdom, France, Germany, Italy, and Poland announced on Friday, the 20th, the launch of a collaborative low-cost air defense program. This initiative aims to expedite the development of drone technology.

data.title: GEOPOLITICS | Russia Warns Against NATO Military Plans for Svalbard
data.description: Russia has issued a warning to Norway and NATO regarding the inclusion of the Svalbard archipelago in their military planning. According to Jin10, the statement was made by Andrey Chemerilo, Russia's Consul General in Svalbard, in a written response to The Wall Street Journal. Some officials in Oslo have suggested that Norway should deploy military forces on Svalbard as a deterrent measure. The archipelago is located in the Arctic Ocean and its international legal status was established by the Svalbard Treaty signed in 1920. The treaty recognizes Norway's sovereignty over the territory while granting signatory countries, including Russia, equal rights to exploit natural resources within Svalbard and its territorial waters.

data.title: AI Security Tool Detects 92% of Real-World DeFi Exploits
data.description:
A February 2026 study by AI security firm Cecuro found that a purpose-built AI security agent successfully detected 92% of real-world DeFi exploits tested in its research. The study analyzed 90 smart contracts that had been exploited between late 2024 and early 2026, representing approximately $228 million in total losses.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/ai-security-tool-detects-92-of-real-world-defi-exploits/

data.title: Uniswap Labs Introduces New Features for AI Integration in DeFi
data.description: Uniswap Labs has unveiled seven new features designed to provide structured access to core protocol operations. According to NS3.AI, these updates are intended to assist developers in establishing AI agent workflows directly on-chain. This advancement represents a significant move towards incorporating AI-driven automation within the decentralized finance sector.

data.title: The probability of the US striking Iran before March 31st has risen to 63% on Polymarket.
data.description: Data from Polymarket shows that the probability of a U.S. strike on Iran before March 31 has risen to 63%, with trading volume exceeding $12 million. Previous reports indicated that the U.S. military is preparing for an attack on Iran that could last for weeks should Trump order it.
